name: Endless Dreamland
short_description: ”Endless Dreamland” is a 3D personal development survival lawn mowing game that gradually strengthens by continuously developing enough resources and props in the early stages, and ultimately battles against the boss.
detailed_description: ”Endless Dreamland” is a 3D personal development survival grass cutting game, where players can gradually become stronger by AFK and defeating monsters to obtain enough resources and props, and finally compete with the boss to win or lose. The game involves forming one's own team of companions, pet teams, and engaging in constant battles with monsters. Killing monsters in the game will earn you coins, and after winning each challenge level, you can enter the next level to fight against different types of monsters
about_the_game: ”Endless Dreamland” is a 3D personal development survival grass cutting game, where players can gradually become stronger by AFK and defeating monsters to obtain enough resources and props, and finally compete with the boss to win or lose.
